form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of four months. Finished off last campaign when last of 8 at Trentham December 14 over 2100m, 14 len behind Tisse with 54kg at $13.70. When resuming last campaign ninth of 12 at this track August 30 over 1600m, on heavy track; 8 len behind Knock Off carrying 54.5kg at $20.80. Cannot be left out of calculations.

form.formComment: Most recently couldn't go on with it; second last of 10 at Trentham on March 21 over 2100m, slow going 12 len behind Helluvah Return with 57kg at $35.40. The race before that did the work up front then tired 6th of 8 at New Plymouth Raceway on March 7 over 2000m, on a slow track; 4.5 len behind Sol De Otono with 56.5kg at $21.10. Disappointing of late and others rate better.
